div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Chile (Shea)
div.p: You are directed to call upon the Minister for Foreign Affairs immediately and inform him that the Minister for Foreign Affairs of Peru has asked the Government of the United States if it had any objection to the publication of the statement communicated to the Presidents of Chile and Peru by the United States. That the Department has instructed the American Minister at Lima to advise the Government of Peru that there was no objection on the part of the Government of the United States to its publication and was so advising the Government of Chile in order that that Government could take the same step if it so desired.
